---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating about the current experience?

## Proposed solution
How should it work? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context
Screenshots, mockups, or examples from other tools.
